author: Tim Rice <tim.j.rice@hackrange.com>
name: cert_wildcard
summary: Validates a wildcard-cert finding (testssl 'cert_trust_wildcard' or equivalent) by inspecting the live leaf certificate's Subject Alternative Name. Single TLS handshake, sub-second.

args.--url: Target URL (https://host[:port]) or bare hostname (required). The probe opens a single TLS connection to host:port and inspects the leaf cert's SAN extension.
